config.script:
import system
	
	def downloadAllData():
	    # Define a mapping of tab indexes to file names and table paths
	    tab_mapping = {
	        0: ("TorqueData", "tblDataCollection"),
	        1: ("Genealogy", "tblGenealogy"),
	        2: ("QADefects", "tblQaDefect"),
	        3: ("LogNC", "tblLogNC"),
	        4: ("LeakTest", "tblProcessData"),
	        5: ("ProcessStatus", "tblProcessStatus"),
	        6: ("VisualWI", "tblVisualWI"),
	        7: ("Pressing","tblPressValue"),
	        8: ("Oil Filling","tblOilValue"),
	        9: ("TestBed","tbTestBed"),
	        10: ("Quality Gates","tblQualityGate")
	    }
	    
	    serialNumber = self.view.params.serialNumber  # Get the serial number
	    all_csv_data = []  # List to hold all CSV data sections
	    
	    for index, (file_prefix, table_path) in tab_mapping.items():
	        try:
	            # Get the table data
	            tableData = self.parent.parent.getChild("TabContainer").getChild(table_path).props.data
	            tableDataSet = system.dataset.toPyDataSet(tableData)
	            
	            # Add header and data if available
	            if tableDataSet and len(tableDataSet) > 0:
	                headers = list(tableDataSet.getColumnNames())
	                rows = [",".join(headers)]  # Add headers to CSV section
	                for row in tableDataSet:
	                    rows.append(",".join(str(row[col]) for col in headers))
	                
	                # Add section title and data
	                all_csv_data.append("\n---" + file_prefix + " ---")
	                all_csv_data.extend(rows)
	        except Exception as e:
	            system.perspective.print("Error processing tab index" + index + ":" + str(e))
	            continue  # Skip to the next index if there's an error
	
	    # Combine all CSV sections into a single string
	    if all_csv_data:
	        csv_content = "\n".join(all_csv_data)
	        fileName = "AllData_" + serialNumber + ".csv"
	        
	        # Download the combined CSV
	        filePath = system.file.getTempFile(fileName)
	        system.file.writeFile(filePath, csv_content)
	        csvBytes = system.file.readFileAsBytes(filePath)
	        system.perspective.download(fileName, csvBytes)
	    else:
	        system.perspective.print("No data available for download.")
	
	# Call the function to download all data
	downloadAllData()
